name: medusa
description: Build and extend Medusa applications across backend modules, workflows, admin dashboard customizations, and storefront integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Build Medusa backend, admin, and storefront features with guided skills
interface.longDescription: Use Medusa workflows to implement modules, workflows, API routes, admin dashboard extensions, storefront integrations, and guided learning paths with MedusaDocs MCP support.
defaultPrompt: Implement a Medusa backend feature with module, workflow, and API route
Help me extend my Medusa admin dashboard with custom widgets and pages
Integrate a Medusa custom API route into my storefront with SDK best practices
